title: Municipal Digital Profile
summary: Structured digital profile system for rural municipalities.
detail: Designed and delivered standardized public profile modules to improve data availability and reporting.
extra: Focused on data integrity, modular service definitions, and cross-department visibility.
client: Deumai, Chulachuli, Phakphokthum, Sunkoshi Rural / Municipality

title: Justice Case Management System (JCMS)
summary: A digital platform for managing judicial committee cases at the local government level.
detail: Implemented end-to-end case lifecycle management including complaint registration, hearing scheduling, decision recording, and status tracking for transparency and accountability.
extra: Built role-based access control, audit-ready activity logs, automated reporting, and structured workflow management aligned with local governance procedures.

title: E-Governance API
summary: REST APIs for municipal services and inter-department workflows.
detail: Built API-first architecture to reduce manual process friction and improve service response speed.
extra: Introduced stable endpoint conventions and reusable validation layers.

title: Flutter Mobile Integration
summary: Field-ready mobile application integrated with backend systems.
detail: Delivered cross-platform operations workflow for teams needing mobile-first access.
extra: Optimized request handling and offline-safe data workflows.

title: Digital Documentary – Chulachuli & Kamal Rural Municipalities
summary: A comprehensive digital documentation project highlighting the history, culture, development progress, and governance initiatives of Chulachuli and Kamal Rural Municipalities.
detail: Captured and structured multimedia content including historical background, socio-cultural diversity, infrastructure development, public services, and community narratives to create an accessible digital archive for citizens and stakeholders.
extra: Integrated visual storytelling, interviews, geographic highlights, and institutional records to support transparency, local identity preservation, and promotional outreach.
client: Chulachuli Rural Municipality & Kamal Rural Municipality

title: Pardaphas News Portal
summary: A dynamic online news portal with robust content management and multimedia publishing capabilities.
detail: Developed a scalable news platform featuring dynamic page generation, multimedia integration, advertisement management, role-based user access, comment moderation, SEO optimization, and analytics integration.
extra: Built using Django and Wagtail CMS with a responsive layout optimized for performance, editorial workflow efficiency, and audience engagement.

title: Navodaya Cooperative Website
summary: Corporate website developed to present services, organizational information, and updates for Navodaya Cooperative.
detail: Designed and developed a responsive and user-friendly website enabling structured content management, service presentation, news publishing, and organizational transparency.
extra: Integrated Django backend with Wagtail CMS for efficient content updates, multilingual support, and scalable content management.
